articles.title: Vishwanova 2026 at MIT-WPU Redefines Innovation with 700+ Teams
articles.description: Vishwanova 2026, the flagship innovation expo of MIT-WPU Pune, attracted over 700 teams and 3,000 students from 120 institutions across 10+ states. From this pool, 240 teams presented prototypes and 60 were recognized for excellence. The event awarded top prizes and cash rewards while emphasizing project-based learning. Industry leaders from Accenture and Seagate highlighted AI integration and ethical innovation. Organized under MIT-WPU leadership, the expo showcased student-driven solutions and strong industry-academia collaboration and lasting impact.

articles.title: Huawei Watch Fit 5 Pro in for review
articles.description: Huawei's Watch Fit 5 Pro is officially global, and is priced at £250. The watch comes in Orange, White, and Black. In the box, you'll find the watch, a nice orange fabric strap (in our case), and the universal wireless charging puck (though one that sadly still ends on a USB-A port). The lineup's design is very similar to Apple's Watch and Watch Ultra, but this year we are starting to see more difference. The front is no longer a flat glass surface like on the Huawei Watch Fit 4 Pro, and instead, there's a noticeable 2.5D curve to the glass. It's still a sapphire crystal glass, so you...

articles.title: BS7 norms may finally end diesel's last stronghold in Indian SUVs
articles.description: Diesel engines remain popular for Indian SUVs, offering torque and efficiency for long drives. However, upcoming BS7 emission standards will significantly increase costs. This could force buyers to reconsider diesel, potentially shifting them towards CNG, hybrid, or electric vehicles. Automakers are also diversifying their powertrain options to cater to evolving customer needs and regulatory changes.

articles.title: ‘We just saw BOGEY & BRILLIANT space object...’: UFO files reveal Gemini 7 astronauts’ 1965 sighting
articles.description: More than 60 years after the Gemini 7 mission, newly released UFO files are bringing back one of NASA’s most mysterious space sightings. The mission transcripts reveal astronauts Frank Borman and Jim Lovell reporting an 'actual sighting' of an unidentified object during orbit in 1965. While no official explanation confirms extraterrestrial involvement, the Gemini 7 reports continue to fuel debate about UAPs in space.

articles.title: UFO FILES BOMBSHELL: Giant ‘Human-Like Beings’ Visited Earth In Flying Saucers? ‘PROOF’ Unearthed
articles.description: After the Donald Trump administration released the records related to extraterrestrial life and unidentified flying objects (UFO), the buzz about life beyond earth has grown louder. According to a media report, the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI)'s findings and investigations on UFO reports in the late 1940s and early 1950s include memos, letters, clippings and field office reports. A memo from 1947 allegedly contained claims about giant human-like beings, flying saucers and "interdimensional visitors". Watch for more.

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy Buds3 Pro and Buds4 Pro receive stability-focused software updates
articles.description: Samsung has released new software updates for the Galaxy Buds3 Pro and Galaxy Buds4 Pro TWS earphones. The update for the Samsung Galaxy Buds3 Pro comes with firmware version R630XXU0AZD2, requires a download of about 8MB, and brings stability-focused improvements to the earphones. The update for the Samsung Galaxy Buds4 Pro, on the other hand, weighs around 8.5MB and comes with firmware version R640XXU0AZD2. But the Buds4 Pro's update, like the Buds3 Pro's, also focuses on stability, as the changelog says the device's behavior has been improved. The software update for the...
